name: PolicyDatabase
description: In-memory loan policy store loaded at startup. Provides the data served by LoanRulesMCP. Can be overridden by a policies.yaml file in the project root.
load_order: Tries policies.yaml first; merges over defaults if found. Falls back to hard-coded defaults.

credit_score.description: Minimum credit score for loan approval is 700. Above 750 is excellent.

dti.description: Total EMI (existing + new) must not exceed 40% of monthly income.

age.description: Applicants must be between 21 and 60 years of age.

Self-Employed.description: Good stability — income may vary seasonally

Unemployed.description: Not eligible — no stable income source

compliance.fair_lending_policy: All decisions based solely on financial merit
